data.raceComments: {"comment":"2. STUNG came home well from fifth of 15 into the turn to score a game win here last start over 1600m in the LR Clare Lindop (Laelia) Stakes at the second run of the prep. Racing over 200m more in distance is a leading chance. 3. KAZARU came from well back in the running into the turn to score last time out over 2100m in the LR Tasmanian Oaks at Launceston. Racing in good form this prep and can make it a hat-trick. 6. MATING CALL has been out of the placings in two runs since resuming from a spell, the latest when a close fourth of 15 over 1600m in the LR Clare Lindop (Laelia) Stakes at this track when well supported. Strips fitter and looks a top-three chance. 4. FREEDOM FLAME wasn't that far away when finishing fifth of 15 last start over 1600m here last start. Trained here and over a longer trip is a must-include in combinations.","runners":[2,3,6,4],"exclusive":true}
